{{Infobox character
| name = Interion
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Interion]] is a [[Champion]] who disappeared after attacking [[Luminian]] headquarters.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
